textByHash.c7ad1884fe14c465326779e77db76046f24ed7c3: Hello there and welcome to the shop of useful items. Can I help you at all?
textByHash.38e38c3058fd4fd2cc7aba51694ccd7e6c43186d: Silverlight? No, Sir Prysin of Varrock explained that that was a unique sword and told us to stop selling it. If you want Silverlight, but don't have it, you should speak to him.
textByHash.8708a9d704b9886158b655473e46d12a9e8514a8: So would you like to see what else I have?
textByHash.dd6276bdfad5338e321311d629efd2d1ea645a17: Okay. Well, if you change your mind, do pop back.
